title: Living in Boulder vlog 11 -  3 - 2017: Linking battles until 1864 on the Timeline

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs at 2:30 AM from Boulder, unable to sleep and high. He gives a progress update on a long-running timeline project geolocating and linking historical battles, currently at year 1864, and estimates he'll finish in about two weeks before deciding whether to move on to castles/cathedrals or a Google Earth project. He also mentions listening to audiobooks while working.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to finish it badly, estimates roughly two weeks out
undecided between castles/cathedrals and completing a Google Earth project
finds the work somewhat brain-numbing but is enjoying it and the audiobooks he listens to while working
